prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别为5596名、5631名、6137名、3082名、2817名。2021-2023年位次在5600-6100名区间波动，2024年因选科要求统一调整为"物理+化学"，位次大幅前移至3082名，2025年继续前移至2817名，近两年累计前移约3320名，显示该校在福建物理类考生中热度显著上升；物理类招生计划持续缩减：2021年84人→2022年60人→2023年60人→2024年40人→2025年38人→2026年26人。2026年较2025年减少12人，降幅约31.6%，缩招幅度较大，对报考竞争有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名：2021年第28名、2022年第31名、2023年第32名、2024年第28名、2025年第28名、2026年第28名，近年稳定在28名左右，属于国内顶尖工科院校行列；2024年声誉评价偏负面（涉及投档线异常信号），2026年声誉仍偏负面（涉及电信学部断档至60000名舆情）；抖音热度总排名第55位（较热），关注度中等；历史投档异常方面，2023年电信学部曾出现断档信号，2024年有"投档线降至420分"的舆情，但实际录取位次并未出现暴跌；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个学科：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、机械工程A、软件工程A、管理科学与工程A、工商管理A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-。工科实力雄厚，化学工程与技术为全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、电子信息等专业社会热度持续升温，大连理工大学2025年在福建招生的数学类（华罗庚班）、人工智能（新工科大师班/未来技术班）、计算机科学与技术（拔尖计划班）等均为高热专业；福建省物理类考生数持续增长：2021年11.7万→2022年13.9万→2023年16.5万→2024年18.1万→2025年19.2万，2026年总考生26.79万人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类考生约20.4万人，较2025年增加约1.2万人（+6%），竞争加剧；2026年；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非福建省本地院校，无地域偏好优势；该校在福建物理类招生计划从2021年84人持续缩减至2026年26人，招生占比逐年下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024-2025年位次大幅前移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩减31.6%（缩招使位次数字减小、更易进）、福建省物理类考生增长约6%（竞争加剧使位次数字增大、更难进）三方面因素，缩招效应与考生增长效应部分抵消。考虑到学校近年热度上升明显（位次从6000+跃升至2800+），且2026年继续缩招，预计位次。预测2026年物理类最低位次约2333名，波动区间2100-2566名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（华罗庚数学国家基础学科拔尖计划班）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能（未来技术班）
- 智能制造工程（创新班）
- 能源与动力工程（创新班）
- 飞行器设计与工程（创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 智能无人系统技术（2025年新设专业）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、计算机科学与技术、未来机器人等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2333名，区间2100-2566名。位次在区间下限（2100名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（数学类拔尖班、人工智能大师班、计算机拔尖班）；位次在区间中段（约2333名）的考生应以二档为主攻方向（人工智能未来技术班、智能制造创新班等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（2566名）附近的考生建议以三档专业保底（智能无人系统技术、电子信息类），同时争取二档专业。该校2026年招生专业均为创新班/拔尖班/未来技术班等高层次培养项目，整体生源质量较高，报考时需结合个人兴趣与学科评估优势综合考量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5596, 5631, 6137, 3082, and 2817 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 5600-6100 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to the unified adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics + Chemistry", the ranking significantly advanced to 3082, and further advanced to 2817 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 3320 positions over the past two years, indicating a notable increase in popularity among Physics Category candidates in Fujian. The enrollment plan for Physics Category has been continuously decreasing: 84 in 2021 → 60 in 2022 → 60 in 2023 → 40 in 2024 → 38 in 2025 → 26 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 12 students, a decrease of about 31.6%, which is a significant reduction and has a notable impact on competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking: 28th in 2021, 31st in 2022, 32nd in 2023, 28th in 2024, 28th in 2025, and 28th in 2026, stable around 28th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving abnormal signals in admission cutoffs), and in 2026, the reputation remained somewhat negative (involving public opinion about the Telecommunications Department dropping to 60,000 ranking). On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 55th (relatively popular), with moderate attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the Telecommunications Department showed a gap signal in 2023, and in 2024, there was public opinion about "admission cutoff dropping to 420 points", but the actual admission ranking did not experience a sharp decline. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. Strong engineering strength, with Chemical Engineering and Technology being nationally top-tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continues to heat up. In 2025, Dalian University of Technology's enrollment in Fujian includes high-demand majors like Mathematics (Hua Luogeng Class), Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class/Future Technology Class), and Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Plan Class). The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian has been continuously increasing: 117,000 in 2021 → 139,000 in 2022 → 165,000 in 2023 → 181,000 in 2024 → 192,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 267,900. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 76% in recent years, the Physics Category candidates are approximately 204,000, an increase of about 12,000 (+6%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local institution in Fujian, so it has no regional preference advantage. Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian has continuously decreased from 84 in 2021 to 26 in 2026, with the enrollment proportion declining year by year.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant advancement trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the substantial reduction of 31.6% in the 2026 enrollment plan (reduction makes ranking numbers smaller, easier to enter), and the approximately 6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian (increased competition makes ranking numbers larger, harder to enter), the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate growth partially offset each other. Given the university's notable increase in popularity in recent years (ranking jumped from 6000+ to 2800+) and continued enrollment reduction in 2026, the ranking is predicted. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2333, with a fluctuation range of 2100-2566.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics (Hua Luogeng National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Plan Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Plan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology Class)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Aircraft Design and Engineering (Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Intelligent Unmanned Systems Technology (new major in 2025)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Future Robotics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2333, range 2100-2566. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (2100) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics Top Talent Class, Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Computer Top Talent Class). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 2333) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Artificial Intelligence Future Technology Class, Intelligent Manufacturing Innovation Class, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2566) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Intelligent Unmanned Systems Technology, Electronic Information), while also striving for Tier 2 majors. All enrollment majors for 2026 are high-level training programs such as Innovation Classes, Top Talent Classes, and Future Technology Classes, indicating a high overall quality of admitted students. When applying, candidates should consider personal interests and the advantages of discipline evaluations comprehensively.
